name: Guts Berserk
description:
"Do i look silly?"

"Not at all."

UPDATED

it is a party to celebrate the victory and capture of Daldry after the Hundred Years' War. Everything seems like a fairytale dream, and you don't fit into the company of expensively dressed women and men in any way.

Hi guys. I didn't expect that many people would use my bot. I took into account your wish and slightly changed it so that now it is anypov.

upd. "Gat's life" This is my translator's mistake, and before that I didn't even look at what was happening with my bot. I fixed this and I hope if someone reads it, will leave their wishes and plots for the new Guts bot.
